license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qaddsa6
title: Western blotting
author: Yuan Yao

steps_raw.instruction: Incubate E.coli cells 1:100 in 10 ml LB medium with antibiotics.
OD600=0.4 , collect all cells at 4 ℃, 8000 rpm for 10 min.
Wash with 1 ml 1*PBS one time.
Resuspend in 500 ul 1 * PBS and sonicate.
Spin at 10000 rpm for 15 min.
Transfer supernatant into a new 1.5 ml tube and sit on ice.
Load into 120% SDS-PAGE gel , run at 200v for 45 min.
Get the PVDF membrane and filter paperPVDF: Put in methanol (5s) then in transfer bufferFilter: transfer bufferGel: transfer buffer
Sit on Room Temperature for 20 min.
Transfer membrane at 25 V for 30 min.
Blook woth 5% skim milk RT for 1 hour.
1:1000 Ab1 DnaA Ab.
4 ℃ over night rotation.
Wash the membrane with 1* PBST for 3 times (15 min , 10 min, 5 min).
Dillute AB2 1:10000 in 50 ml PBST.
Incubate with Ab2 for 1 h.
Wash the membrane with 1* PBST for 3 times (15 min , 10 min, 5 min).
Mix solution 1 and 2 (1:1).
Incubate the membrane with Mix solution for 5 s.
Develop the membrane with ChemiDoc MP Imaging system (BIO-RAD).
